passwordReset.title: Reset Password
passwordReset.mustChangeAtLogon: User must change password at next logon.
passwordReset.notInBreaches: Not found in any known breach
passwordReset.mustChangeCheckbox: Must change password at next logon

moveObject.objectsWillBeMoved: The following object(s) will be moved:

mfa.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a backup code.

mfaSetup.title: Set Up MFA
mfaSetup.description: Add an extra layer of security by enabling TOTP-based multi-factor authentication. You will need an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
mfaSetup.step1Description: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually:
mfaSetup.enterCodeDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify:
mfaSetup.invalidCodeRetry: Invalid code. Please check your authenticator app and try again.
mfaSetup.step2Description: MFA has been set up successfully! Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
